originalTitle: i-dle (아이들) 'Gimme Dat Love' Official Music Video
content: i-dle (아이들) 'Gimme Dat Love' Official Music Video [🎧] [We made] 🔗 https://i-dle.lnk.to/Wemade Composed by Abraham Olaleye “Daramola”, Alyx, Samantha Camara, Daily Lyrics by icebluerabbit, Alyx, Samantha Camara, 샤넌 배 (Shannon Bae) Arranged by Daramola, Daily ======= [Lyrics] Keep me on my toes 시선 끝이 닿을 때면 Shivers through the bones Chemistry just flows 아닌 척 눈썹을 구겨도 Do you not think so?
